title: Racosperma roycei
taxonomy: Racosperma roycei is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Western Australia. The plant was previously classified as Acacia roycei. The classification of Racosperma roycei falls under the genus Racosperma, which is now considered a synonym of Acacia. The exact classification of the plant is still subject to some debate among botanists.
